potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall enable an alarm feature upon activation of the alarm button.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The system shall change mode from 'Display' to 'change hour' on a single press of the mode button.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall display the current mode.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The system shall increment the minutes by one unit upon each press of the advance button while in 'change minute' mode.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall display the current time.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall enable an alarm feature upon activation of the alarm button.
hallucinations.reason: This requirement is not mentioned in the source text. The alarm clock feature was described in a previous exercise, but it's not explicitly stated that this digital watch has an alarm feature.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall change mode from 'Display' to 'change hour' on a single press of the mode button.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall change mode from 'change hour' to 'change minute' on a subsequent press of the mode button.
duplicates.reason: These two requirements are essentially the same, just with different modes. They should be combined into one requirement.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall illuminate the watch face on a press of the light button, remaining illuminated until the button is released.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is ambiguous because it doesn't specify what happens when the light button is pressed multiple times. Does the watch stay lit indefinitely?
